---
title: "Edward Hugessen Knatchbull-Hugessen, 1st Lord Brabourne"
---

## Edward Hugessen Knatchbull-Hugessen, 1st Lord Brabourne

**Dates:** (1829-1893)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1871)

### Biography

He was created (1880) 1st Lord Brabourne;  he was great-nephew of Jane Austen,.

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 11th [1888]
- Letter from Decr 3/1870

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
